scope: C-04 file-search/git-utils: add the shared Git discovery and metadata helpers currently needed by AgenC, while preserving existing AgenC file-search, grep, and glob coverage from prior items.

consultedButNotPorted.reason: merge-base/upstream-ahead helpers are not required by any C-04 live AgenC caller; porting them belongs with a caller that needs branch ancestry behavior.
platform symlink creation is unrelated to the current shared discovery/status helpers and has no C-04 live caller.
AgenC exposes a focused GitCommandError for subprocess failures instead of the full donor error enum; other enum variants are tied to patch/baseline walkers outside C-04.
diff-to-remote depends on branch ancestry and untracked-file diff aggregation that no current C-04 live caller needs; it should be ported with the first caller that surfaces remote diff state.
AgenC exposes getGitRemoteUrls with the repository check included; an unchecked variant is intentionally omitted until a caller can prove it already validated the repository.

requiredBehaviors: walk ancestors from a directory or file path looking for a .git directory or .git file
return null when no repository marker is present
resolve linked worktree .git files back to the owning checkout for stable per-repository storage
edgeCases: nested file paths start from their parent directory
malformed worktree metadata falls back to the nearest checkout root
linked worktree metadata validates the backlink before canonicalizing
linked worktree metadata must place the worktree gitdir under the declared common directory's worktrees folder before canonicalizing

requiredBehaviors: run git through child_process with argument arrays and a bounded timeout
disable optional locks for read-only status and metadata commands
collect commit hash, current branch, repository remote, dirty state, local branches, and recent commits from real git output
return null or empty collections for non-repositories instead of throwing from status-style helpers
keep remote maps safe for special names such as __proto__ and constructor
bound subprocess runtime and captured output for exported git command helpers
edgeCases: empty repositories do not force a fake commit hash
push-only remote lines are ignored when parsing fetch remotes
origin is prioritized when ordering remotes for default branch detection
slash-containing branch names round-trip from remote HEAD refs
zero or negative recent-commit limits return an empty list instead of an unbounded log
failed git commands throw GitCommandError through runGitForStdout

requiredBehaviors: fuzzy file search returns scored path matches and respects repository ignore rules
grep and glob tool surfaces already cover the file-listing overlap called out by C-04 through completed TL-05 and TL-06
edgeCases: nested ignore files and external gitdir info/exclude files are honored by the existing fuzzy search tests
C-04 does not duplicate those already-owned search helpers into a second runtime path
